title: COMPREHENSIVE DIAGNOSTIC ASSESSMENT CLINIC - 211info
text: UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC COMPREHENSIVE DIAGNOSTIC ASSESSMENT CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers strength-based, comprehensive evaluations for Attention-Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder (ADHD) and learning disabilities (including dyslexia, dyscalculia, and dysgraphia). Does not provide autism diagnosis. 1655 Alder Street Suite 170 Eugene, OR 97403 Eligibility: Ages 7 and older Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment only Email (541) 346-0923 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 346-0923 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: $800 flat fee DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-8pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located in the south wing of the HEDCO building on the University of Oregon campus Services: Mental Health Evaluation * Disorders of Infancy/Childhood Mental Health Evaluation * Learning Disabilities Pediatric Developmental Assessment * Disorders of Infancy/Childhood Pediatric Developmental Assessment * Learning Disabilities Other Services Offered At This Location: COUNSELING SETTINGS - CENTER FOR HEALTHY RELATIONSHIPS HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SPEECH LANGUAGE AND HEARING CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - CHILD AND FAMILY CENTER MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - COUNSELING PSYCHOLOGY CENTER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. UNIVERSITY OF OREGON HEDCO CLINIC
